title: pic

messages.description: open an image file named by the symbol
a bang is output if you click on the image
pic width/height when in report size mode

flags.name: -open <symbol>
flags.description:
sets file name to open
default: empty

flags.name: -outline
flags.description:
sets to outline mode
default: no outline

flags.name: -size
flags.description:
sets to "report size" mode
default: no report

methods.description: open an image file named by the symbol
same as open, but pd doesn't ask to save changes
non-0 sets to report size mode

body: [pic] loads image pictures that you can interact with. It only works with file types: .gif, .ppm & .pgm. you click on the picture and it sends a bang (default) or 1 when clicking and 0 when releasing (when in latch mode).
